title: Create Enchantment Industry for Create 6
description: Automatic Enchanting, for Create 6. Same as the original mod but UPDATED!
body:
# **STOP DOWNLOADING OLDER VERSIONS INSTEAD DOWNLOAD 1.8.3**

This mod has been updated from Create 5 to Create 6 for Fabric by [mpnordland](https://github.com/mpnordland/CreateEnchantmentIndustry-Fabric-Legacy.git). The port was excellent, but it required their port of Create Dragon Lib, and you had to build it yourself from their source code. Additionally, the printer model was broken, so I fixed that, and decided to publish it here on Modrinth for all to access.

This mod **WILL** be updated so make  sure to click on report issues on the right. It will take you to my Github page where you can ask for new features, bug fixes, etc.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/GUhjizZvHJM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Welcome to Create Enchantment Industry, a mod offering more tools and methods to handle experience & enchantment in Create.

We currently offer:
- **Liquid Experience:** High-density experience that is easy to store and transport.
- **Disenchanter:** disenchant item and collect experience as liquid.
- **Blaze Enchanter:** automated enchanting.
- **Printer:** Copy your written book, enchanted book, name tag and train schedule.
- **Deployer & Crushing Wheel Tweak:** Kills of Deployer & Crushing Wheel drop experience nugget.
- **Hyper-enchant mechanism** allows you to get enchantment whose level is higher than level cap.
- **Mending on belt:** Items enchanted with Mending can be repaired using Spout and Liquid Experience.
- **Deployer with Sweeping Edge:** Deployer now benefits from sword with Sweeping Edge Enchantment.

Installation Requirements: Fabric, Fabric API & Create Fabric or Quilt & Create 6.0

Credits:

```
**RBus** (Polish localization)
**qkrehf2** (Korean localization)

**[mpnordland](https://github.com/mpnordland/CreateEnchantmentIndustry-Fabric-Legacy.git)** (Create 6 Port)
**random_revilo** (Maintainer)
```

Looking for [Forge support](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry)?
